Headline: TRADE: Rams acquires D.Newcomb from Falcons
Description: Rams and Falcons pulled off a straight swap. B. Fiske (DT, 80 OVR) heads to Falcons while D.Newcomb (DT, 80 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.

Headline: TRADE: Falcons and Colts swap 2043 draft picks
Description: In a quiet pre-deadline move, Falcons and Colts exchanged future draft capital. Falcons sends their 2043 Round 2 pick to Colts in exchange for a Round 2 selection. Both teams are positioning for the future.

Headline: TRADE: Bills acquires J.Uwaezuoke from Bears
Description: Bills and Bears pulled off a straight swap. S.Dora (CB, 76 OVR) heads to Bears while J.Uwaezuoke (LEDG, 74 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.

Headline: TRADE: Broncos acquires W. Dissly from Chargers for Round 3 pick
Description: Broncos made a move at the deadline, sending a 2044 Round 3 pick to Chargers in exchange for W. Dissly (TE, 73 OVR). Chargers adds future draft capital while Broncos gets an immediate upgrade at TE. The pick is a rental but the timeline makes sense.

Headline: TRADE: Colts acquires Andrew DePaola from Vikings
Description: Colts and Vikings pulled off a straight swap. T. Warren (TE, 83 OVR) heads to Vikings while Andrew DePaola (LS, 81 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.

Headline: TRADE: 49ers acquires G. Gaines from Buccaneers
Description: 49ers and Buccaneers pulled off a straight swap. B. Purdy (QB, 86 OVR) heads to Buccaneers while G. Gaines (DT, 73 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.

Headline: TRADE: Chiefs acquires Browning from Cardinals
Description: Chiefs and Cardinals pulled off a straight swap. Marquise Brown (WR, 78 OVR) heads to Cardinals while Browning (LEDG, 74 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.
